quote: Helloo Durr, ik your exams are tomorrow and you'd be super busy but i just wanted to drop a quick message to say how awesome you are for getting this far in the finals prep, seriously, your dedication is no joke, and I'm super proud of you! I know exams can be soo stressful specially when u have two in one day, but hey, you've totally got this, take a breather when you need it, okay? keep taking breaks and don't forget to keep telling urself u r proud. I'm sure you'll be balancing both subjects with perfection! Don't forget to take short breaks. netflix, snacks, texting—anything that makes you smile, you've aced prep, and you know your stuff, keep taking care of yourself and treat urself to nice food and sleep your brain deserves the full VIP setup. PROM bhi nikal jayega easily IA and Arabic like your baby. Please Please sleep early as your exam is early morning. Your mind needs to be well rested so you can ace both the exams back to back. It's gonna be challenging but my Durr is a warrior and she'll overcome anything!🩷 Also, if you need a study break buddy or just wanna vent, i'm here, you're not in this alone! You're going to crush it IA 🫶🏻 يا حبي، سوف تقوم بعمل رائع في امتحاناتك غدًا، لقد حصلت على هذا!

Hi everyone! This is Saman Kazmi - TA and EB Lead at EBM. ☺️ Thank you everyone who attended the Assessment center in Karachi on 13th May. We hope you had as much fun as we did! We value your experience and would love to hear your thoughts, feedback and any suggestions you may have. Your input will help us improve our process and ensure a better experience for future candidates. Please share a short video, message or testimonial with us with your full name and university. Would love to hear from all of you 😊🙌 Thanks a million and good luck for the final stage! ✨

Hi guys, as the semester has officially ended, I just wanted to extend a heartfelt congratulations to each and every one of you on making it through! This semester must have been hard with courses like FM, but your unwavering dedication helped you through. I am super glad that I took this opportunity to be your TA (honestly, I said no once to NJA already but reconsidered). You all are a bunch of wonderful souls, and I'd never forget when you all celebrated my birthday and gave me those cute chits🫶🏻 I hope I was able to, in some way, make some impact in your lives. Many of you would have just 2 years left in IBA. While grades and parhayee do matter, remember to make *MEMORIES* and live every moment to the fulleet because you're not going to get this time back. Lots of amazing things to come your way, so make sure to grab every opportunity and avail them to the fullest! Also now for some real talk bas ab semester poora houne wala hai, idk how it was for you guys but it was absolutely amazing for me and I wish it never ended but here we are :( But the point i’m trying to make here is, most of u have 2 years left in uni; make the most of them! Also enjoy your summer vacations too as third year mein aakar itni unnecessary stress hai; you start thinking about your future ke internship kahan karni hai job kahan karni hai generally future ka kya hona hai and pata nahi kya kya. And I hope you guys remember that whatever happens, it’s always always always for your betterment Here are a few things i’ve learnt this year, and i kind of want you all to know: - God’s plan is always better. It’s always a good idea to accept and adapt rather than whine about how things are - If you really want something to happen, you pray for it, and you work for it. Never let anyone tell you, you can't do something because u can! - You do not get the results you want if you are not putting in the hours consistently. So, while it may seem cliché you need to be dedicated. Things aren't always gifted in a plate. - Sometimes, things do not seem good at the surface level, but everything always turns out okay, let it be grades or anything else. Don't worry about them and just give your best. There are things you can control and things you can't. Always focus on things you CAN control. - Your nature and manners are the most important thing you have. People will always remember the respect you give them the most, and they'll also reciprocate. - Make sure you have your priorities straight and your goals aligned - If anything goes wrong, always pray. prayer is key to success and your efforts serve as a roadmap in achieving that success. Take care of yourself!🥺 it’s completely okay if you don’t get the grade you want, bas ye course nikal gaya bari baat hai tbh. Keep working hard, IA sab ki GPA raise hougi and agar nahi hui tou next semester hai na; aag laga dena sab🥰 After the final marks come, it’s unlikely that we will interact related to FM again. But in future if you're ever in need of any support or guidance or you find yourself at some crossroads in life, i’m always here and always a dm away, please never hesitate🫶🏻 Love and prayers for you all! Your fav TA

hi maazu, j before sleeping i was thinking abt how u cover up when u might be upset or having an off day, yet you're always there for me <3 ap bologe ap nai chuppate lekin bS 🙄🙄🙄 j want u to know that i love u so much words cant describe but also that i 100% believe in u and every single day im in awe and inspired by ur sabr and unconditional kindness, you're a wonderful and incredibly talented person allahuma barik dont ever doubt this 💗 you're going to achieve so much in life inshallah and ill be there w u for all of it 🥰 apki har baat mere liye behadh precious tareen hai and i appreciate u a lot n honestly i wish it was possible to show u just how much i cherish u 🙁❤️ mere words are not enough <3 but i hope it'll give u an idea :) khair,, never lose ur optimism, i adore it to bits 😚 hope youre sleeping welllll, ilysm 💗

So umm here goes the final night of my girl's vacation? Omg she's gonna become the corporate girlie and will rock the pso's world (without ac?) Very soon🥺❤️ i am superrrr proud of herrr. Before sleeping just wanted to write for u Meri jaan you're my heartbeat. You were sad tonight🥺 but I'm glad you felt better, had a lovely call and in it we discovered a lot of mutual things of love and affection ❤️ however, just to let yk that my words (even sometimes not straightforward) means pure🥺 I can't see or make u upset😔 and I'd want to do everything to make u happy baby InnshaAllah ❤️ you're literally the biggest blessing for me from Allah. My cutoest pyaruest stupid and pretty baby dictator 🥰 Stay happy and keep shining and I'll always love you sooooooooooooooooo much meri jaan. Ap ho hi itni achi aur pyari, dil chahta apko apne sath glue karlun 😚😚😚😚 I hope you have a sleep as amazing and wonderful as you're. muahhhhhh baby, I love you ❤️

To the girl on whom my happiness depends, With love that never ends. You light up my life with your cute ways, And fill my heart with love and grace. Every day, I will want you to know, You mean the world to me, and my love will continue to grow. I am so grateful for our bond true, Here's wishing all our dreams come true. Have the third day as wonderful as you, Filled with love, laughter and all good things too🥰 I am sorry I got rude and got you hurt,🥺 Should have been shameless and rather flirt Never meant to make you sad, Because your love is all I'm fed 💓 You'll always be the one I love🥺 Always my cuto baby shining like a dove✨️ Just want to wish you a pleasant day Allah bless you forever, I pray! ❤ (Just wanted to write for you because i love you so much and I just wanted you to know that you're just toooooo important for me🥺❤️ and I couldn't sleep thinking about you)

Heyyy baby, so while you'd be sleeping now, here I am still adoring the blessing Allah has given me🥺❤️ you're the cutest person to ever exist and I am so happy that we are together alhamdulillah. Some days are shiny Some are rainy Some are happy Some are painy In either of those days, please don't give me space. Please squeeze me so tightttttt, hug me close and always share with me everything that's on your mind or you're going through 🥺 hey, remember we are in this together so we'll navigate these rough patches together too (NEVER will i be ever upset or rude to not listen to you, your even a single smile can make my saddest of the moods the happiest) You're literally the reason of my happiness, and I can't ever see you sad🥺 I'm super happy we called again and talked and talked and were able to laugh and end on a very smile note (let's always do it like this, we are a couple now so we need to always prioritize our relationship more than everything❤️) Ap meri jaan ho and I'll do everything for my cutopie. All the very best for tomorrow, ace up the presentation, the work and calls and make me super proud like always 💝 you're my nincompoop forever <3 Never leave me alone (even for more than an hour🥺). Stay the happiest self, I love youu sooooo much even beyond words can describe ❤️ Goodnight babyyy

Super sleepy rn baby but couldn't stop myself from writing to you BECAUSE I'M SO EXCITED🥺, your *special* day today as YOU'RE FINALLY CONCLUDING YOUR 6 WEEKS INTERNSHIP!!! I'm super proud of you baby❤️ going through it was no easy feat but you have done it MashaAllah! I acknowledge all the hardships and challenges you had to face but alhamdulillah you stood tall and gave your best. Remember it doesn't matter who cares and who doesn't, you should never let others define you but your efforts. Ik it personally the amount of efforts you make and InnshaAllah I can't wait to see you ending on a high note🥺🫶🏻 So, just be calm, relaxed and give your best shot while delivering the presentation. Remember, no one knows what's in script or what you've to say next so even if you forget, keep going. Replace the filler words like "umm" "you know" (i do them a lot) with small pauses, they make a big difference. And lastly, make winning postures and be optimistic ❤️ take deep breath and rehearse as you can. It's natural to be anxious, you got this jaan! I would love to see you acing it InnshaAllah, I'm already so proud of you. I believe in you <3 With all my love❤️, goodluck baby

i hope ur not upset baby i wasnjust saying awein ke ap stickers bheja karte thay but nowadays ull just like n leave my msg toh it was j abt thag aur mein toh bhejti rehti hun yk that too so idky u said ap bhi but its okay also ik i didnt reply to ur above msges i did read rhem n loved them but decided not to reply since ik phir u wont sleep for even longer and uper se mama bhi soyi nai toh it was not easy to stay on phone right next to her but sorry baby anyways goodnight ily💖 <This message was edited>

I did get hurt when you said behes nahi karni (you said this pehle too) which made me think all night if that's what my intention was or if that's what I do everytime (honestly in my mind, I just thought to first explain my pov which seemed like i was being assertive and I'm sorry for making you feel that way)

I'm really glad to see your text and you opening up about how you feel. I kinda felt shut down after feeling like doing behes but I think the best thing we both should do in this scenario next time is to pause foran se for a minute and remind ourselves, "we are on the same team right?" We both love each other to bits and I'm sure none of us wants to be sad or make other sad. Taking a moment and then clarifying the intentions will help us avoid these InnshaAllah. I also read a study where they shared that the couples who actively resolve conflict by mutual compassion and hearing each other tend to be the happiest and longest (manifesting us fr InnshaAllah). Also read that feelings are always real even if they feel irrational and lastly to never reply to someone sharing their problems and then bombarding them by telling them what you did wrong instead (I am sorry i guess i did that last night instead of listening to you which caused a conflict). So, we can work together on these things and simultaneously keep praying and we'll get perfect together ❤️ I know it might feel bohat agay ka, but I'd like to set things abhi se and do things that help us grow together ❤️ you matter to me so much, you can understand when u look in my eyes. I'll never wanna make u sad but I'm sorry kabhi kabhi hojata🥺 It took me so long to write because brain 5% capacity but I just wanted to write to tell you that I appreciate you so much in my life. I do listen to you and try my heart level best to follow too. You're amazing (bas naraz jaldi hojati ho ap🫣) You're my cuto, my sweetheart, my heart. I love you to bits and I hope you wake up freshie fresh on a quizzy day. I'm sorry for anything that hurt u mera baby, let's get better together and for anything I'm always here for u baby 💓 <This message was edited>

im sorry to hurt ur feelings but it genuinely feels like i have to argue my point like 10 times for u to listen to me once and even then ap prolly behes karke apni hu sunoge. like i asked u to tell me whatever formula ur thinking and ill write it down n ur lile no and then im like what ru doing ur like im just watching u u didnt say that ur actually doing the formula too lol🤣 meanwhile im trying to figure it out yet ur of no help or not mentioning that uve got it bas choro bhai thank u for all ur help i appreciate it infinitely but i dont appreciate this at all

Life after graduation? Smooth sailing at GSK! One month ago, I began my journey at GSK as a Finance Trainee, and it’s been an incredible experience so far! 🚀 Graduating from IBA this May was a proud milestone, and stepping into the professional world has been an exciting new chapter. Thankfully, GSK’s supportive culture made the transition seamless. The environment here is collaborative, welcoming, and focused on growth, making every day an opportunity to learn and thrive. As a Finance Trainee, I get the chance to work on projects that align with my interests and passion for the field. It’s been thrilling to expand my understanding of finance in such a dynamic and setting. The work-life balance here has been remarkable, and it’s not just about work! I got to experience a new take on team bonding. Our finance department recently had a picnic which was a refreshing way to connect with colleagues outside the office. 🏖️ I’m truly grateful to my Line Manager, @AsadSaleem, for his guidance and mentorship. I’m excited to continue learning and contributing under his leadership as I navigate this journey. Looking forward to discovering more about life at GSK and growing both personally and professionally in the months ahead!

Its a long read. So sit down, keep some water with you and read it with an honest heart. I have to tell you something and i know you ll be hurt hearing this. I wanted to say this yesterday but you're happy yesterday and i didnt want to ruin it for you. But now i cant keep it in me because the fear of losing you without telling you kills me every second. Before i say anything i absolutely want to know that my feelings for you and me being your friend are 2 different things and i have never mixed these up, I was never your friend just because I had feelings for you and i dont want to change that any further from here. I want you to listen what i have to say. I have had feeliings for you before i even started my CA it was a mere crush back then but i did like you and i never knew it would be this serious, but in my unconciousness i always was i guess. I chose CA over university because of you ( weird ikr because then it was just a crush). I wanted to earn every bit of money i can and be financially stable as soon as i can for you. I tried and i studied and i worked extremely hard(yk it better than anyone else) You know how eager ive been to get on my feet for mother, the one reason i never mentioned was you. My mothrr and you were the reasons i have done and achieved what i have and you both are the reasons why i want to earn sm to give you both the happiness you both deserve. Every time i failed it killed me because it was a step back on being with you. I am not telling you this because i did some sort of ehsaan on you, no never i want you to know that you are worthy of all of this and so much more, never settle for less. I dont want you to ackownledge anything i just needed you to hear this. Ye tou hogyi of my useless working hard. About my feelings for you, I have had feelings for you like i said since July of 2021, i dont know how i did why i did but i just did and I have loved every moment of it. The initial months were scary, you know for a guy who overthinks as much as me, i got scared and worried to the thought of anyone liking you or you liking anyone. That part i guess was the beginning of what brought me close to Allah, i prayed and i prayed alot. For the next 2 years i didnt miss a tahajud where i didnt pray for us. I did cry a bit of times ahahahahaha i will not lie but yeah. Its been 3.5 years and its always in my prayers. I think like is not the strongest word i can use right now so infact i do love you samiya, and i really like that feeling. I admire how you stand by me and are my peace in the toughest times and i really feel good when im your safe space. I dont know how exactly to say what i feel except that. i love you i care about you. Im saying everything i can think of right now (masjid me betha hu hath kaanprhhe😭). Now what the reality is; I know im not worthy of you samiya, but ever since day 1, i cannot comprehend losing you to another man. I swear i seriously cannot, that is my worst nightmare and lol while im typing this someone who barely knows you gets to have a chance, isnt that a bit unfair. Anyways, since i couldnt comprehend that thought i tried to make myself better and i swear on my Allah ever since i have tried my best to be worthy of you, be it how i talk, how my physique is, how i think, how i go with my life, how i dress and where i am financially. I have tried everyday so hard and i dont mind a day because YOU ARE WORTH IT, you're worth the hard work, the trouble the grind. I know I am still no where near being worthy of you but I am trying i promise I am. I'd do that for the rest of my life if it means to have you. There is no right thing i wouldnt do to have you. Part 2 of reality. I know, and i know well you dont like me or have feelings for me. Im aware of the reality in your house too but like i said i dont know how to give up, and you? To give up on you? I dont know how to do that. I know that you can find someone way better than me and that thought sucks for me because i tried doing nothing wrong. I know you dont believe in love and thats the toughest thing I have to get through. What i ask of you: Samiya, like i said i know the reality and trust me i have over thought every single reality before it has occured over the past 3 years. I know you dont like me i know I am not the best guy, but Samiya i want you to TRY for one time, for 1 day, i want you to try, to think about what i can offer, what your life would be with me, if i can keep you happy, if i can provide for you, if i can be the man you want me to be. The answer to all those thoughts for 1 day is all i want.All I have ever done in the last 3.5 years is try and try again and again to be with you. Please try for me, for something good that i may have done for you. I can only request you, I know how you operate and I know it will be difficult but still I really want you to, Try. If you are willing to try then theres nothing that cannot happen. Do not worry about hurting me What i think of you: I think you are an amazing person, you are mature, intellectual sensible all in the right proportions. You're humorous anr caring and more than anything youre there for people. Dont get me started on your looks ahahah. I find you attractive and i think thats more than enough to say. I think you'd make for a wonderful wife and an even better mother (a real og desi mom😅). So dont blame me for wanting you. Youre one to spend the rest of the life with. Anyways, none of what my feelings or efforts I have done in the last few years were asked by you and i in no sense want to imply that i did some ehsaan on you. I did that because I love you samiya and you are worth every single effort. Prospective answer, I know, because I know you, and it hurts me because someone will get you without doing anything while i tried sm, worked hard sm, prayed sm and i could never, *maybe*. But still doesnt stop me from trying. Also i needed you to hear this. Why speak now? Because at first before telling I wanted to be something capable for you, to have achieved smth for you, im almost there but I couldnt wait, the fear of losing you without you knowing scares me more than being trapped in a haunted house. I wanted to speak. before too yet i couldnt because i promised Allah i wouldnt untill i become something myself, but Allah himself brought me here. Khair. The words in my brain have to come an end, now since you are my friend ill speak a little whats in my heart. I want you to choose me and i want you to be there for me and i want to spend the rest of my life beside you. I want to marry you, thats all i have ever dreamt of since day 1. I want to be your safe space i want to be one that provides for you, and Allah be my witness i want to make you so happy. I prayed alot, begged allah to give you in my nikkah, idk what happens from here I really like you samiya. I couldnt ever think of any girl besides you in these years, kia jaadu kia tmne pata nahi per haye... Now you know why i find you pretty in any case! Theres no woman in this world that id choose over you right now.(cringe but true 😭). I am scared of losing you, i dont want to, i hope some miracle happens, because i see my future with you.( this is raw so please excuse a little too much slip of expressions😅) Anyways umm, whatever you decide ill respect that and i dont want to think what my emotional side for you will decide because i dont think negative and umm i cant. So, think about what i said take your time all you want. I really would try and push the mountains to be with you because thats all i know; to try and pray. I want you to know that very well, do not settle for any less. Thats it. Azaan bhi hogayi, I will go and pray. I hope things work out, i hope Allah helps me. Im sorry for not telling you earlier. Also, thankyou for being there for me, for being my peace, love you. Ps. I know wrote it so formally but idk thats how i could speak everything. Take it as a handwritten letter, alot of emotions and ik ull feel the urge to say cringe alot but thats okay. No goodbyes because im not going anywhere. Sign krdeta hu end me cool lagunga Hashir Sheikh. Full time hottie part time CA.

Hello Team Innotech, Congratulations to you and your team for clearing the screening round. You are now one step closer to the National Finals! The Presentation Round of Brandstorm 2025 gives you a great opportunity to showcase your clutter-breaking idea to the jury. I have attached a meeting link below, where we expect your team to join exactly at 2:40 pm, Wednesday 19th March 2025. You will have exactly 10 minutes to present your idea, followed by 5 minutes of Q&A. The slides will be showcased by the jury, which you had submitted on the portal prior. It is essential for all your team members to join the meeting and present the idea. We request you to: Have your videos open, you cannot make the same impression with a blank screen: thus, a must! Make sure you have Microsoft Teams downloaded on your device and mics enabled before the presentation Sit in a noise free zone and prepare your pitch beforehand Don’t go overtime! Divide it amongst your peers, regarding the flow and order of the presentation. The jury will stop you at exactly 10 minutes. Good luck with your presentation! We are excited to see you soon! Regards, Team L’Oréal HR ❤

hi maaz, i've thought to write down my feelings for u. u asked if i didnt ljke ur tareef and mujhe bilkul apki tareef achi nahi lagi, it was my eid day 1 and i had dressed up just for u and sent all my pics just to u and definitely wanted some attention and love from my man, ofc ap nai toh aur kon? 😭 dont get me wrong, im appreciative of what u said, which felt like u didnt really think over 2 secs b4 typing it, but the man i fell in love with was so much more. u used to write me poetry even, where did it all go? now instead of u, people jm not close w were replying to my story w so much better lol. its not a competition its never a competition i WANT ur attention only in every instance but jm deeply hurt that even after requesting u previously (konsi larki apne bf se bolna chahegi ke sahi se tareef karna yaar?), all u did was halfass it which u claim to be from ur heart. if this is all thats in ur heart then i am deeply concerned about the state of our relationship. I do think that i would deserve better atleast from the man that i have chosen for myself? secondly haha, the fact that u didnt insist to call even after seeing me sorta off. once again, it was my eid day 1 and u didnt even bother to try and hear abt my day. i shared my deep feelings with u over how it would be a tough day for me and u couldnt even bother to try to get on a call with ur gf. i dropped multiple hints to u that im awake so u shud msg me and ask to call but u msged goodnight instead. u know very well how much i miss u, even staying up till 4 am just to talk to u, even asking u to wake me up from sleep so i could hear abt ur eid, but no u didnt spare a thought. 😭 writing this makes me feel like our rs is in shambles maybe cos its 5am rn. I fell in love with a thoughtful considerate man who proved to me time and time again that i was top of his priority. But currently im with a man who, when hes busy at work, he doesnt have time for me (understandably) but also when hes at vacation he doesnt have time for me 😭 i'm not a priority in any case. so yes, this is it. this is what i felt. its nothing i havent shared before, its stuff ive told u time and time again till now when ive realised that yeah i cant do this anymore. maybe im overthinking, maybe im self sabotaging cos i dont think i deserve a good thing but for now its too hurtful. i dont ever want to give up on us but i am just so so deeply hurt. idk maybe uve started taking me for granted haha and barely care to impress me anymore but if it really is that way then im very worried for us. Regarding my istikhara, maybe this all has been a sign in itself. I've noticed infact, our problems have intensified ever since i mentioned that i want to tell my mom. maybe it is a sign after all. God knows how much i dont want it this way :') please guide me, what should we do?

happy birthdayymeri jaan 🥺❤️ finally the mostest best day is here cos my soulmate was born on this day!!<3 hmm baby where do i start 😭 I often think back to where we were at this point exactly one year ago, sometimes when i think back to life before i met you, it feels like an absolute blank like my life was empty, missing smth, bland in colors but ab apke sath its as if everything has become so much more beautiful, so much more colorful and theres just so much more to look forward to in life IA. every single day with you has been full of love and joy and i hope its like that for us always ❤️ a life full of dates, surprises, supporting eachother ameen when I first met you, i remember clearly going home and telling my friend i met a cute guy who was really sweet, then when u gifted me a brownie i told my friend just how nice u are, and then when u gifted me for my bday, i just knew i had been falling for u all along. i love you so so much that there are no words that could ever describe, ofcourse i can try to but ull never know the extent of how much i love you properly i bet i love everything about you maaz :( from your cutuest laugh to ur gentlest voice, ur kind and caring approach to everyone u meet, ur optimistic view in life, ur efforts and ur dedication in things, ur beautiful soul, ur lame humor, the way u take care of me, the way u love me. Gosh, i am just so so lucky to have you :( my heart is so full. if you want to know what i tell my friends about you, ill finally share it with you. I tell them that you're more than just a romantic partner, you are someone thats not just my bestfriend but also someone who inspires me to be better on a daily basis, to strive to improve on who i am and its honestly because of you that I havent been spiralling into a deep depression since last summer when internship recruitment season started. youre my rock, my confidante. before meeting you, i didnt want to get married, i was ready to stay single till like 30 (literally, i used to say this) or let my mom arrange marriage me off, but now every single day i think that i cant wait to start the next chapter of my life by ur side inshaAllah. I know that it will be full of struggles but I just know we'll find our own happiness in every single phase of life inshaAllah Moreover, the fact that u entered my life and absolutely met all of my high standards, even exceeded them, still shocks me. Recently, a single friend was telling me how she thinks she'll stay alone forever bcos of how high her standards are and i rmr i literally told her, if you wait patiently, you will find someone who meets every single quality you have ever wished for and that is so so so true for us alhamdulillah alhamdulillah. I get so scared of nazar when it comes to you and me because what we have is so solid, is so perfect mashaallah that i just know kisi ki bhi ankhein lag skti kisi ki bhi nazar lag sakti and nazar is powerful enough to take lives bas I pray Allah saves us from that and its troubles. Coming to your most important quality, your relationship w Allah. What I have looked for always in a partner and I see it in you and it just excites me so much for when im finally and officially yours in a halal manner inshaAllah. I admire the way u go to masjid to offer regular prayers, I fantasise a life when one day ill be praying behind you at home inshaallah🥰 (ik that might sound regular to you but ive never had that 🥺) I want us to be two people that can always count on eachother in every single matter including our faith because that is something that fluctuates but together, for the sake of Allah, we could love eachother properly and encourage eachother to be our best versions and im just so excited IA. idky ive teared up and started cryinf while writing this hahah, its just my heart is so full of you and is aching so much just to be with you. im just so lucky and so so proud of you. you're slowly healing a part of me that i thought was permanently broken. you make every bad experience ive had w m*n seem insignificant, infact since every single experience of mine has brought me to you, in grateful it all happened. I hope you know that you have a lifelong partner, bestfriend, cheerleader, everything in me and that I am ALWAYS rooting and praying for you, for our families, for our futures inshaAllah i love you so much, have a lovely birthday IA(with me plss) and may u have many many more (with me pls) ameenn 🥺 may Allah provide u w every happiness in this life and the next ❤️ and ofcourse provide u me 🥰🥰 what else could you needd hehe 😘 jaldi se apne ghar pr batadete hain ab, i hope youre as excited and nervous as me hehe ik its going to be tough but we'll overcome it IA stay the same always, love me always🤪😜 happy birthday meri jaan 💗

✨ Stepping into a beauty store, what really catches a Gen Z shopper’s eye? Is it the latest TikTok buzz, a friend’s recommendation, or simply the joy of finding something that speaks to them? During my final semester at IBA Karachi, I teamed up with L’Oréal Pakistan to answer that exact question by working with Asad Kaleem. Our ELP, “Understanding Beauty Rituals, Consumer Journeys, and Decision-Making of Gen Z,” took us from campus surveys to in-depth interviews and persona workshops. Along the way, I learned: ⭐How digital trends and real-life rituals shape purchase decisions ⭐Which brand messages resonate (and why) with today’s young consumers ⭐How to turn raw feedback into clear, actionable ideas for Maybelline Huge gratitude to Ms. Farah Naz for guiding us, to Asad for helping us throughout, and to my brilliant teammates Abeer, Almirah, and Samiya for making every brainstorming session a blast. I’m proud of what we created and excited to bring this hands-on experience into the next chapter of my career as I enter the corporate world! 🚀

✨ What does the inside of a Gen Z's mind really look like? What drives them to pick one lipstick over another? Is it a viral TikTok trend, a friend’s glowing review, or just the spark of finding something that feels like them? During my final semester at IBA Karachi, My group and I had the incredible opportunity to work with L’Oréal Pakistan and Asad Kaleem on our Experiential Learning Project: “Understanding Beauty Rituals, Consumer Journeys, and Decision-Making of Gen Z.” From on-ground surveys to focus groups and persona-building, this journey revealed: ⭐ How online trends and real-world rituals shape Gen Z’s beauty habits ⭐ What messages truly resonate with young Pakistani consumers — and why ⭐ How to turn raw Gen Z feedback into clear, actionable strategies for Maybelline New York This project would not have been possible without the unwavering support and expert guidance of Ms. Farah Naz, who mentored us at every stage, from refining our research approach to shaping our final recommendations. And a huge shoutout to my brilliant teammates Abeer, Almirah, and Samiya — your ideas, energy, and collaboration were the heartbeat of this project. Every late-night brainstorming call, every slide revision, every debate brought us closer to something meaningful. I’m truly proud of what we built together — and excited to take this hands-on learning forward as I step into the corporate world. 🚀💄

Dear Durriya, I've spent an entire year with you, and it’s truly been the most amazing experience of my life to know you, to be with you, to love and care for you, to appreciate every little moment, from our lovely coffee dates to attending events together at IBA. Honestly, it feels almost like a beautiful dream that I never wanted to end. I’ve felt more emotions and created more wonderful memories with you than I ever imagined possible tbh mujhay kabhi nahi lagta tha that Id get someone amazing, and I genuinely want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for all those special times. You asked what I love about you, and honestly, I had to pause and reflect deeply because there's so much about you that is amazing (had to think what isn’t amazing because I found everything lovely). You're someone who embodied every wonderful quality I've ever dreamed of u r someone who is caring, understanding, and genuine. Appreciating me for who I was and always made extraordinary efforts to show your love and care. Your smile alone had the brightened my entire world during the darkest days, your voice I love hearing. I started sharing this with you subah, but my eyes filled with tears, and the words just wouldn’t come out. One of the very first things that made me fall for you was your incredible compassion and kindness. You genuinely cared, you listened to me patiently, and you were always there when I needed you the most. I've never truly experienced such care and support and understanding until you walked into my life and ap ne dikhaya that how it feels good to be loved for and cared for, someone who’d wait for my msg and someone who wants me to be safe. You made everything feel easier, warmer, and incredibly special. Looking back, I often wonder how I was fortunate enough to have someone as amazing as you by my side especially during the difficult times, like my job hunt. You were my strength, my comfort, and my hope through it all. And the same for the dental treatment wala part. As time passed and I joined AKU, our connection grew even stronger (your dream place haha and your moms too). Being able to meet up during events, spending quality time together, and experiencing life by your side was genuinely very precious. I remember how I casually mentioned the idea of you earning with me and you never said no and stepped up to help me with the C-Vision work. You encouraged and pushed me to finally explore freelancing on upwork, something I hadn't considered possible for the past three years. Your belief in me provided the motivation and courage I needed to start something meaningful, and for that, I'll always be eternally grateful. I wanted to earn more, achieve more, and create a better future so that I could offer you everything you deserve. Even during times when I was working tirelessly for long hours, feeling burned out, you were my constant support. Your reassurance made all the difference, reminding me it's okay, that we would make it through together. Thank you deeply for always being so understanding, thoughtful, and supportive. Your thoughtful gestures and sweet gifts have a special place in my heart. The chocolates, especially the beautiful hand bracelet you gave me to wear, the birthday gifts were so cuteeee and lovely! I cant stop missing our food adventures in DHA exploring new places, discovering cozy coffee spots, simply enjoying each other’s presence made me feel genuinely alive. I was never someone who went out often, but with you, I wanted to experience the world every single day. Every moment spent together was precious and beautiful. I miss those spontaneous days when I'd pick you up after PE sessions aur uske baad we d spend the whole day together HAHAH and it all would flow by so quickly and I would be sad when I had to be dropping u off to campus. Seeing you excel at L’Oréal filled me with immense pride and happiness. Watching you thrive and achieve your dreams means the world to me and IA very soon you will get into an amazing MNC and I am genuinely praying a lot for you! Everything will work out in the best way IA! Not sure, how long we have together but I wrote all this to let you know that the woman I fell in love with was and is perfect in my eyes literally every single part of you. Every single thing all those small details about u makes you uniquely you and I know there cant be someone ever like you! You are genuinely the most pure, honest, caring, thoughtful, and loving person I've ever known. Thank you, Durriya, for being you, for everything. I love you for everything and I will never stop cherishing the good memories we created and the wonderful time we had! ~ With love

Hey, I hope you are going to have a wonderful weekend! (Disclaimer that in no way I want to overwhelm you or push you away. I just wanted to do this one last try before your or my family would completely get off road. You can take all your time and be better and figure things out, I'll handle everything else and will give you all the space and time you'd need. I wanted to wait a month or so before sending to give you more space but I just cant, can't afford to lose you😭) I'd want to take this as one last opportunity, knowing there can probably be absolutely no chance from your end (but I hope there's 🥺) but I'd like to take it anyway because I don't want to give up on you while there's even a vvvv minute chance. I am always open for you working and I'll be your mom's son and will personally be supporting her too. Your ambitions are my ambitions, your dreams are my dreams, your goals are my goals. I'll not just be a partner, I'll be your other half, I'll always uplift you, I'll always help you and yk I just love to make things for you, whether helping through recruitment or what, I love being there for you. I'll always be supporting you in your goals and you'll be along your mom be my responsibility and I have already talked to my family about this and they are so happy to hear me being mature and doing the right thing. I'll love your family like it's mine, ofcourse I will be right with you and your shield in every thick and thin. I am taking a very firm stand and I know you're worth fighting for and I'll do whatever is in my power to make it work IA. Iske baad jo hua wo naseeb ki marzi but I believe in Allah, in my pure intentions and knowing that he knows the best and how much I'm praying for you. I'd like to know if you'd want to be on my side as I'm so used to of being with you, you always completed me and made me whole and I feel super lonely right now, but I won't stop fighting and winning my other half back no matter whatever it takes Your mom mentioned that she liked us and that you wanna study and do job. If you feel like you're not ready now but will be later, I'll be happy to wait for you if we can't do masters together. I just wanted you to know that I'll wait for you and be only yours. But if your heart is completely off me and won't want to consider me ever then please let me know too. If you wanna take your time before answering, or just a straight no, I'd appreciate your honest take. Part of me still has some hopes of all the prayers I did, but I don't have the power to change or control hearts and no one but Allah. But there's a strange hope in me that Allah might do a miracle, can't just stop praying. Your answer will help me a lot in solving the unstoppable scenarios that I keep seeing with eyes closed or sleeping. Break ups happen and there's still a possibility of getting back (just like the movie we watched to all the boys I've loved before). It's the hardest for you and ik you push people away to avoid getting hurt and I've hurt you a lot but trust me I'll do it all to regain your trust back if you allow me. You know my intentions, my heart, my trust for you and care for you was always real and pure. Nazar really got us, ah I wish nazar na lagti, what used to be a happy couple, got destroyed in chaos, but part of me still believes that our love was so pure and strong that we can bounce back even in the darkest of times. I always told you I won't give up on you, I don't know how to let go of the most precious thing of my life, my absolute will to live and love and be better every single day, to provide love and to earn so I can fulfill all your wishes. Life won't be the same without you and in our hearts we'll always have that feeling. I promise to be better than every guy you'd find in this world, Allah knows my heart is so full of you and I'll genuinely give you everything I got. I'll be the best version of myself for you and your family and for everyone I'm a human and I have made mistakes and I dearly repent them and I promise I'll do everything to make it better. I'll do everything to take care of you and to give you so much love that you'd forget every single thing. I found true love in your form, I don't want to let it go, let you go that easily. I'll handle everything, my family, your family, you, career, I'll do whatever it takes to turn your life into a heaven. I promised that I'll do it before and make you feel the most loved person, I did some mistakes that I'll not repeat this time and show you all the care and all forms of love that you deserve. I'll be a man, like you always wanted. This heartbreak made me a completely different person, one who is willing to do everything to win your heart back if there's a remote chance to do so. My heart is so full of you and even if yours is empty, I'm ready to do whatever it takes to fill it again, anything I'll do for you. I just want to know if you'd want that too. Naseeb is real and may Allah sabke naseeb achay karay but prayers can turn and shape destinies too. Har cheez beshak Allah k hath mein hai but Allah wants us to make conscious effort and I didn't want to leave it just to prayers but to reach out to you again knowing your answer might not be positive but I just didn't want this chance to let you go. Allah tests us with hurdles and I just want to remain steadfast InnshaAllah. Even if it's like finding a needle in haystack, I'll take it. Even if there's minutest of the feeling in your heart for me that feels the same and wants the same, I'd like to know. Just a few weeks without you and it felt like a lifetime of darkness: https://www.facebook.com/share/r/14SnxDD8gKk/ I couldn't sleep all night, cried my heart out but everytime I'd close my eyes I'd see you. Saw you in a happy dream with me too that gave me the courage to write it all down and poured all my heart infront of you. Please take your time and think from your heart and mind, think of both good and bad times (I promise to take them away), think of the times when you were happy and times when you were sad (I promise to make them happy). Think of how being with me felt (I promise I'll make it better and better and it gets better when we aren't talking on texts but living together, I won't argue with you or hurt you ever intentionally. These are very honest words, words I have reflected over and over again. I wish I could do more than this, I wish I had a clock to reverse time, but I can only promise by God, that I've changed a lot and I'll keep working on every flaw of mine to become the best for you. Make you feel the princess you are deserving of you). This is the time we manifested dearly, families meeting and discussing. This time might never come back again (life is cruel as it rarely gives us second chance 🥺 and I want to choose you over everything else so that life may never contain this regret of finding the love of my life and letting her drift away🥺 I don't want you to go, you're my rock, my safe place and on any given day I'd wanna choose you over everyone else. If this moment goes away, the dream would vanish as both families would move on, but if, if there's a slightest of chance you'd wanna take more time and re-decide, I'll handle everything else. I'll fight for what's it worth, take a stand until you're ready. This very moment can change the course of our lives, I just want you to know that there's still a chance if you've any possibility of reconsideration. One chance to change the life and I promise to make it so beautiful that you'll end up forgetting all your worries. Please please give it one final thought (for the sake of all good times and moments and happiness and joys that we shared, for the sake of me and you and all the memories we created and all the plans we made for future and for the sake of our love that we held for each other). I'll wait to hear from you, an honest answer. I'm here to answer anything, clarify anything, reassure anything or do anything to prove my words
Please forgive me for anything, any harm that I caused because of my words or actions. I'm genuinely sorry for anything and wish u nothing but the best. Take care and Allah Hafiz❤️

Hi! I'm Aleezeh, a psych senior. I'm trying to get responses from graduates in the iFem group (really sorry if you're a student - but please do share this around) I am conducting research for my thesis on workplace design, aesthetics, and employee well-being, and I need employees working in Pakistan, aged 21-65 to fill this survey. It'll take 15 minutes to complete. Participation is voluntary, and all responses will remain confidential. Also, pictures and the interview are optional so you can still submit the form if you don't want to add pictures! https://forms.gle/soXeYjgnxrCMu51y9 Thank you in advance!

Hey ​I just wanted to wish u a very pleasant new year ahead as this almost ends. I also wanted to take a moment to thank u for making my 2025 beautiful and for all the good memories and for everything. It has been amazing and thank u so much for being a constant part of it ​I’ve been meaning to send this for a while. Every day I would get up and try to make the thoughts but then when I start to pen it down I just can not find words to explain it but I kept writing and refining as I wanted to send you this tonight at the end of 2025 (which was so difficult to do so because I'd keep making changes to the message and I was tempted to send earlier) ​We haven’t been talking for a while and I know I’ve messed up a lot. I’ve hurt u a lot and it’s something that has been haunting me. I’ve just been in this constant state of depression honestly. I’ve just been thinking about it and thinking about it and I just wanted to deeply apologize for everything. I really wish that things would have taken a different turn and I wish that things would still have been better ​I’ve thought a lot like a lot and would just keep replaying scenarios in my head. Even right now when I’m writing this down I can barely hold my tears back. I just wanted to pen it down because it had been such a big burden on my heart. There is so much more to write but I don’t know if it matters anymore to u ​you were the highlight and the best part of all the memories. I just could not wish it any better except for the hiccups :( I wish those could have been better. U r such a pure person. Such a pure heart. I don’t think there is anyone who has a pure heart than u. You're one in a million, heart of gold, evergreen nature and flawless smile that rewired something in me. Thanku for your selfless love and for everything, even if I'd try a million times, I might not get this ever. It’s just something that I miss so much. I wish I could have expressed all of this to u in person but my voice would have broken down right in the start ​U mean a lot to me. In these few days that I took a lot of time to think back in retrospect I just feel like I neglected you a lot. I wish I didn't. I didn’t treat u as I should have and be the guy, gentle and loving guy you wanted :( I don’t know if it’s too late but if there is any possibility to fix it or give it my all ☹️ I’d take it. The more I think about u the more I think about everything else and I just could not think about u going away from my life. What I have in my heart for u is also very pure. My intentions with u were always to be with u forever and I’ll never stop. I’ll never give up on that. If there is any chance or any possibility I’ll take it to try to fix it. To try to make your life better. But I understand if not. If u don’t feel like it. I know it hurts u a lot and what u decide also matters a lot. ​In these few weeks I’ve probably had the most difficult time. I thought I’ll skip the thoughts and everything if I travel or change my environment. But every single day and every night and every moment when I close my eyes or when I watch something or hear something it just... it just pops through my head. I couldn't help as everything reminded of u ​Since we haven't been talking the only thing that would even make me happy would be. I don’t use Instagram but now I would just look at it every single moment to see if there is any story that u posted. Even just seeing it would make me so happy. So much so that I was happy that I would send u the snap and u would open that and that would make me happy too. Just to know that u exist and u are there. ​I’ve also been offering Tahajjud. I’ve been praying a lot. I’ve been really taking a lot of time to reflect and think back. The more I do it the more I realize about the areas that I have to improve. I’m trying my best to be better. ​I mean there’s so much more to say but I think it's already so long. Thank u for everything in the whole year. It’s just been the most fascinating one and now that it's ending I just wanted to write this down for u. I know that I started the year with u and I just wanted to make sure that I end it with u being the last person I would text in 2025 as you'd be the one on my mind the most 😔 ​I just hope and wish and pray that 2026 is a much better year. I hope it helps all of us in everything. I don’t know where life goes and how things go from here but I’m just going to pray and wish for all the best. I’m not sure if ur heart feels for me anymore or if u would even want me in your life anymore. But I'd be happy if we can have a possibility of starting 2026 fresh. I don’t know why just even writing this message I’ve been overthinking a lot fearing what u wud respond to it. Would u even react to it ☹️ All the scenarios I’ve built have kept me up. Tbvh never felt this nervous before sending any message ever ​Anyways, I wish u a very pleasant and lovely and joyful 2026. I hope it turns out to be the best year of your life InnshaAllah. And I hope may it be the year you have prayed for, all your prayers come true and your dreams come to life <3 ~ Yours truly

Picture yourself, You did something, I'm deeply hurt. I said about everything I had to say, when you told about all the efforts and love, you said it's all about past. I say that I deserve better and I want someone better. I say that I don't want this relationship anymore. You only make false promises and actions zero. I know I'm hurt, but what do you feel when you hear that I'm so confused about this relationship, about you, can't even think of moving on. Can't remember all the efforts, love and things you did for me. It's not about gaslighting, if you after a few days want to see if that's what I really meant. Do I really think this? (I am just taking this as a final opportunity to explain. I don't want your sympathy, I don't want anything from you, I don't want to make anything about me. I just tell you so that you know that feelings are real, we are humans. You won't know it was traumatic for me as well just to think and how much I repented nor I'd like you to think because your trauma was bigger and I have no right to share my embarrassment and my heart melting into pieces. Deep down I just wanted one positive thing, just one to know that there's still some love, it's not about me and you but we. Deep down i just craved to hear that yes maaz you've always made efforts for me yet this time you've done unthinkable that you loved me so much and how could you. Ps I'm not gaslighting you, please skip the response as well too)

Okay so I was able to see this is detail at night The only 2 points that could create an issue are: (i) Fund Planning (ii) Recording of monthly treasury related transactions Wese to usually Fund Planning ka final decision Manager level per hi hota hai, but uski base per advisory waala kaam hi hota hai. Since you’re not making the final decision, to directly it’s not Haram. Dusri cheez hai recording of transactions. There’s a hadith thay says ke Interest lene waala, dene waala, aur record kerne waala sab baraber hain. Wese is hadith ka generally matlab yehi liya jaata hai ke record kerne waala is the person who creates the contract or is named as a witness of contract. But mujhay aesa feel hota hai ke this applies to accounting of interest based transactions as well. Wese to I personally feel ke avoid kerna hi behtar hai, why risk at all. But Ullema kehte hain ke you’re allowed to work in such roles if you’re unable to find any other means of livelihood. To aap yeh bhi ker saktay ho ke isko accept kerlo, meanwhile dusri jagaho per phir bhi aggressively apply kerte raho, and then leave at the first chance you get
